title: MD4digest
text: MD4digest Produce an MD4 message digest. extern void MD4digest (unsigned char * Value , unsigned int Length , unsigned char * Digest ); Parameters Parameter Direction Description Value IN Data stream for which the digest is to be produced Length IN Length of the data stream Digest OUT 16 byte digest Use Library uenc Description This function is useful for creating security drivers that need to encode and decode data.
